name: agent-knowledge-compiler-and-control-plane
description: Agent Knowledge Compiler and Control Plane (AKCP). Compiles organizational knowledge into versioned, agent-consumable artifacts and controls how agents discover and act on them.
author: Vinicius Carida

scripts.test:mcp: pnpm run test:contract && pnpm run test:security
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @akcp/dashboard exec playwright install chromium && pnpm --filter @akcp/dashboard exec playwright test
scripts.quality:gate: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:coverage && pnpm run test:contract && pnpm run test:security && pnpm run test:conformance
scripts.smoke:quickstart: node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate --bundle examples/domains/career --profile career && node packages/cli/dist/index.js compile --config examples/domains/career/akcp.yaml
scripts.examples:validate: node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate --bundle examples/domains/career --profile career && node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate --bundle examples/domains/it-operations --profile it-operations && node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate --bundle examples/domains/customer-support --profile customer-support
scripts.release:check: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run quality:gate && pnpm run check:metadata && pnpm run check:identity && pnpm run check:docs && pnpm run check:links && pnpm run examples:validate
